# Level

> Level is a web app for grassroots youth football coaches that builds fair,
> balanced player-rotation plans for a whole match — who plays where and when —
> so every child gets a fair share of game time while every game stays balanced.
> It weighs both playing time and player ability, respects goalkeeper priorities,
> position preferences and formations from 5-a-side to 9-a-side, and works for
> both season matches and tournament days.

Level exists to answer the "Sunday-morning maths" every grassroots coach knows:
who has had a fair go, who has been stuck in goal, and how to keep both players
and touchline parents happy. It aligns with The FA's grassroots youth football
guidance on giving every child meaningful game time.

- Marketing site: https://keepthingslevel.com
- The app: https://app.keepthingslevel.com
- Contact: hello@keepthingslevel.com

## Key facts
- Audience: grassroots youth football coaches, team managers, and clubs (UK).
- What it does: generates a full match rotation plan, balancing playing time AND
  skill/ability across quarters, positions and the whole squad.
- Formats supported: 5v5, 6v6, 7v7 and 9v9; configurable formations.
- Modes: Season (track game time across a season) and Tournament (balance
  rotation across back-to-back games in a day).
- Match-day tools: live pitch view, drag-and-drop "tinker" adjustments that
  rebalance the rest of the plan, a match timer, and goal recording.
- Fairness: shares game time with a guaranteed per-child minimum, and can share
  specialist-goalkeeper time so one child is not stuck in goal all match.
- Data & safeguarding: first names only (surnames only to disambiguate), no
  player photographs, per-team data isolation, EU-hosted, delete on request.

## Pages
- Home: https://keepthingslevel.com/
- About (founder story — a parent, coach, referee and former Designated
  Safeguarding Lead): https://keepthingslevel.com/about.html
- Privacy Policy: https://app.keepthingslevel.com/privacy.html
- Safeguarding & Children's Data Statement: https://app.keepthingslevel.com/safeguarding.html
- Terms of Service: https://app.keepthingslevel.com/terms.html
